# Copilot Instructions — Aspire Academy

## Critical Rules

### No pushing without explicit user consent
**NEVER push commits to any branch (especially `main`) without first asking the user for explicit permission using the ask_user tool.** This applies in ALL modes, including autopilot. Even if the user says "commit and push" in the same message as other work, you must confirm the push separately after the commit is ready.

### Branding
- Aspire is **polyglot** — never say ".NET Aspire". Use "Aspire" alone.
- Do not bias user-facing copy toward .NET or C# developers.
